summary: Tested 'Turnos de Pozo' Expo + FastAPI app end-to-end. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass via public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (auth, role enforcement, multas CRUD with fecha_creacion/fecha_pago preservation, multi-tenant isolation across pozos, notifications fan-out, emergencias, dias-sin-servicio, turnos calendario, historial, estadisticas, change-password). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): landing well-selector renders 3 pozos, login flow works, contador dashboard opens FAB modal, creates a multa via socio picker, sees it in list with MXN amount and DD/MM/YYYY date, deletes it via confirm modal. Socio dashboard shows Hola/turno-hoy card, calendar with month grid and turno markers, emergencia modal with 3 types (tuberia/hidrante/presion), action grid (Emergencia/Recorrido/Notificaciones/Multas). All listed testIDs render in DOM as data-testid. No deprecated expo packages detected. No React Native red screen, no console pageerrors. Test_credentials file is present and complete.
action_items: Optional: expo doctor reports version drift (expo 54.0.34 vs ~54.0.35, expo-font 14.0.11 vs ~14.0.12, expo-router 6.0.23 vs ~6.0.24). Non-blocking, app loads and bundles fine, but main agent may run `npx expo install --check` to align.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses single-file architecture (~810 lines). Acceptable for this size, but if features grow consider splitting into routers/ (auth.py, multas.py, turnos.py, notificaciones.py).
JWT_SECRET has insecure default ('cambia-esta-clave-secreta'). Acceptable in preview but should be required in production environment.
All Mongo _id are stripped via clean() helper; UUID 'id' fields used consistently. Good.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL via api client; no hardcoded URLs found.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (made BASE URL fall back to EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of executed flows (landing, login, contador multas CRUD, socio inicio + emergencia modal + calendar)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created; relied on backend's built-in seed (30 users across 3 wells, password pozo2026).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/{test_api.py,test_extra.py} and run against EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Login is JSON body {email,password}. App is wrapped in a 480px PhoneFrame on web; use viewport 390x844 for testing. The 'Iniciar sesion' and 'Soy usuario' buttons are disabled until a pozo card is tapped on the landing page. AuthContext persists token in localStorage so to test multiple logins clear storage between sessions. Modal close animation can briefly leave overlay; add wait_for_timeout(700) after Escape before next click.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
